name: english
text:
the night of (2016) mr robot

daunting - пугающее, сложное i really struggled in the first few previews - well, suit yourself - ну, как знаешь viciousness - злоба, порочность

doesn't remotely resemble — не имеет ни малейшего сходства с don't you dare throw bunny out of bed for (out of) curiosity sake — из чистого любопытства best prank i pulled as a child and i was so pissed off
